summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Football Dixon-Coles + Negative Binomial calibration feature. All 5 piezas verified: (1) DC bivariate matrix with tau, (2) conditional NB modulator (inert at ratio=1.0), (3) integration into compute_match_features with telemetry, (4) football_totals_calibration.py with global-before-bucket rule (n>=100), (5) wiring of parameter resolution + endpoint + backtest runner. Backend-only testing as requested.

backend_issues.notes: No backend issues found. All endpoints working correctly.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing skipped as requested (backend-only testing)

passed_tests: Backend startup without errors (verified via supervisor logs)
Pytest suite: 1004/1004 tests pass (979 previous + 25 new DC+NB tests)
Specific DC+NB calibration tests: 25/25 pass in test_football_dc_nb_calibration.py
GET /api/football/totals-calibration/summary?days=90 returns 200 with correct shape
Response has all required fields: ok, summary, available, rho, dispersion_ratio, by_league_tier, by_offense, bucket_application_policy
rho.to_apply within clamp range [-0.20, 0.0] (default: -0.05)
dispersion_ratio.to_apply within clamp range [1.0, 2.0] (default: 1.0)
All league tiers present: TIER1, TIER2, TIER3, UNKNOWN_LEAGUE
All offense buckets present: LOW_OFFENSE, MODERATE_OFFENSE, HIGH_OFFENSE
bucket_application_policy.mode = OBSERVE_ONLY (correct)
Fail-soft behavior: days=0 handled gracefully (capped to 7)
Regression: GET /api/football/pattern-memory/summary still works
Regression: GET /api/picks/today?sport=football still works
Regression: GET /api/picks/today?sport=baseball still works
Regression: GET /api/picks/today?sport=basketball still works
Mathematical correctness: NB with ratio=1.0 matches DC pure (verified by unit test)
Clamp verification: rho positive clamped to 0.0 (verified by unit test)
Clamp verification: ratio<1.0 clamped to 1.0 (verified by unit test)
Persistence: auto-derive offense_bucket from lambda_total (verified by unit test)
Global rule: n<100 returns defaults (rho=-0.05, ratio=1.0) (verified by unit test)
Bucket rule: all buckets OBSERVE_ONLY until n>=100 (verified by unit test)
Telemetry: compute_match_features emits dc_rho_used, goals_dispersion_ratio, p_under_*_poisson, dc_nb_delta_*_pts
Backtest runner: build_backtest_match_doc pure helper works correctly
Backtest runner: _infer_league_tier works for TIER1/TIER2/TIER3/UNKNOWN_LEAGUE
Backtest runner: _decide_outcome correctly determines won/lost for Under 2.5

mathematical_correctness_verification.nb_inert_at_ratio_one: CONFIRMED - NB with ratio=1.0 produces EXACTLY the same matrix as DC pure
mathematical_correctness_verification.rho_clamp_positive: CONFIRMED - Positive rho clamped to 0.0 (upper bound)
mathematical_correctness_verification.dc_rho_zero_identity: CONFIRMED - rho=0 recovers pure Poisson exactly
mathematical_correctness_verification.dc_renormalisation: CONFIRMED - DC matrix renormalises to sum=1.0
mathematical_correctness_verification.under_prob_calculation: CONFIRMED - Under 2.5 sums cells where i+j <= 2

calibration_rules_verification.bucket_observe_only: CONFIRMED - All buckets OBSERVE_ONLY until n>=100 of their own
calibration_rules_verification.bucket_application_policy: CONFIRMED - Mode=OBSERVE_ONLY, no bucket-specific application yet
calibration_rules_verification.fail_soft_behavior: CONFIRMED - Invalid inputs handled gracefully (days=0 caps to 7)
